title: Add support for unpacked structs
body:
Icarus Verilog does not support the System Verilog used in the [fx68k](https://github.com/ijor/fx68k) M68000 open source core.

It seems like these two features are missing:

1. Support top level **localparam**
2. Support for **typedef struct** statements

I would like to see these enhancements implemented so we can use iverilog for FOSS M68000-related projects.
